bird.name: Stripe-cheeked greenbul
bird.summary: The stripe-cheeked greenbul (Arizelocichla milanjensis) is a species of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in south-eastern…

locations.name: 姆蘭傑山
locations.summary: 姆蘭傑山（英語：Mulanje Madsif）是非洲東南部國家馬拉維的孤山，位於該國南部布蘭太爾以南70公里，長26公里、寬22公里，在1億3千萬年前形成，海拔高度3,002米，每年平均降雨量可達1,800毫米。 參考資料

relations.subject: Stripe-cheeked greenbul
relations.evidence: The stripe-cheeked greenbul is found in the highlands of south-eastern Malawi (Mount Mulanje), extreme eastern Zimbabwe and west-central Mozambique. Image:AT1006 map.png|General range of stripe-cheeked greenbul

relations.subject: Stripe-cheeked greenbul
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
